content: Playwright bundles device descriptors (e.g. devices['iPhone 14']) setting viewport, deviceScaleFactor, userAgent, isMobile, hasTouch in one config line. Playwright's WebKit device emulation uses desktop WebKit engine, not real mobile Safari, so some iOS-specific scroll/fixed-position quirks won't reproduce exactly -- acceptable for this harness since Branch 3 cares about selector interaction, not pixel-perfect mobile Safari rendering. webServer config in playwright.config.ts can auto-start 'npm run dev' before tests and reuse an existing server in dev.
